accounts.name: escrow_authority
docs: Buyer signer whose Magic escrow funds settlement.

errors.name: AssetAlreadySold
errors.msg: The asset has already been sold.

errors.name: BidTooLow
errors.msg: The submitted bid is below the seller minimum.

errors.name: InvalidArgs
errors.msg: MatchOffer args could not be decoded.

errors.name: BuyerNotCleared
errors.msg: Buyer has not been cleared for this transaction.

errors.name: ClearanceMismatch
errors.msg: Clearance record does not match the buyer.

errors.name: ClearanceExpired
errors.msg: Buyer clearance has expired.

errors.name: PrivateBuyerMismatch
errors.msg: This private listing is reserved for a different buyer.

errors.name: PositionNonTransferable
errors.msg: This vesting position is marked as non-transferable.

errors.name: SettlementNotPrepared
errors.msg: This vesting position requires settlement attestation before matching.

errors.name: SettlementBuyerMismatch
errors.msg: Settlement approval does not match the buyer.

errors.name: SettlementExpired
errors.msg: Settlement approval has expired.

errors.name: SettlementProofMissing
errors.msg: Settlement approval is missing a proof id.

errors.name: SettlementPolicyVersionMismatch
errors.msg: Settlement approval was issued under a stale policy version.

errors.name: SettlementPolicyDisabled
errors.msg: Settlement policy is disabled.

errors.name: SettlementAttestorRevoked
errors.msg: Settlement attestor is no longer allowed by policy.

errors.name: PaymentRoutingDisabled
errors.msg: Payment routing is disabled.

errors.name: UnsupportedPaymentMode
errors.msg: Only native SOL payment routing is currently supported.

errors.name: InvalidPaymentFeeConfiguration
errors.msg: Payment fee configuration is invalid.

errors.name: SellerPayoutMismatch
errors.msg: Seller payout account does not match the current seller.

errors.name: ProtocolTreasuryMismatch
errors.msg: Protocol treasury account does not match policy.

errors.name: OperatorTreasuryMismatch
errors.msg: Operator treasury account does not match policy.

errors.name: MissingProtocolTreasury
errors.msg: Protocol treasury is required by policy.

errors.name: MissingOperatorTreasury
errors.msg: Operator treasury is required by policy.

errors.name: ConsentNotPrepared
errors.msg: Issuer / admin transfer consent is still pending.

errors.name: ConsentBuyerMismatch
errors.msg: Issuer / admin transfer consent does not match the buyer.

errors.name: ConsentExpired
errors.msg: Issuer / admin transfer consent has expired.

errors.name: BuyerNotSigner
errors.msg: Buyer must be the transaction signer.

errors.name: TimestampRequired
errors.msg: A valid current timestamp is required (must be > 0).

errors.name: ClearanceEntityMismatch
errors.msg: Clearance is not scoped to this listing entity.

errors.name: PaymentEscrowAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Magic escrow authority must match the matched buyer.

errors.name: EscrowNotWritable
errors.msg: Magic escrow account must be writable.

errors.name: EscrowNotSigner
errors.msg: Magic escrow account must be a signer.

errors.name: AssetNotSold
errors.msg: The asset must be sold before payment settlement can run.

errors.name: InvalidTokenProgram
errors.msg: Token program account is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidTokenEscrowAuthority
errors.msg: Token escrow authority PDA is invalid.

errors.name: TokenEscrowNotWritable
errors.msg: Token escrow account must be writable.

errors.name: BuyerTokenAccountNotWritable
errors.msg: Buyer token account must be writable.

errors.name: DealTermsMismatch
errors.msg: Deal terms account does not match the matched listing.

errors.name: TokenAmountMismatch
errors.msg: Token amount does not match the listing deal terms.

errors.name: InvalidTokenEscrowAccount
errors.msg: Token escrow account does not match the listing mint and escrow authority.

errors.name: InvalidBuyerTokenAccount
errors.msg: Buyer token account does not match the matched buyer and listing mint.

errors.name: OwnerNotSigner
errors.msg: Signer does not match the listing owner.

errors.name: ListingNotInitialized
errors.msg: Listing has not been initialised.

errors.name: TokenEscrowBalanceTooLow
errors.msg: Token escrow balance is below the listed token amount.
